Template Description: Filmhub CSV Metadata 3.0 - Filmhub Movies & Shows
Movie/Show Synopsis: In an apocalyptic future, a group of soldiers and scientists takes refuge in Amsterdam to try to stop an army of robots that threatens the planet.
Movie/Show Sales Pitch: Short film made in Amsterdam the Netherlands by the Blender Institute, well known for realizing the open source short animation movies “Big Buck Bunny” and “Sintel”. Crowdfunded, it uses a complete open-source pipeline for producing a high-quality visual effect film.
Festivals: Ars Electronica, Seattle International Film Festival, International Melzo File Festival, Melzo, Italy, Nordic CC Film Festival, Stockholm, Sweden, Future Film Festival, Bologna Italy, Webcuts Festival, Berlin, Germany
Cast: Derek de Lint, Sergio Hasselbaink, Rogier Schippers, Vanja Rukavina, Denise Rebergen, Jody Bhe, Chris Haley, Daan van 't Einde
Tag(s): Amsterdam, End of the, Rescue, Science, Warrior, apocalyptic, boyfriend and girlfriend, break-up, futuristic, memory, prosthesis, prosthetic, robot, science fiction
Movie Subtitles/Captions Languages: en, de, ja, ru, da, cs, hr, fr, es, nl, es-419
Movie Subtitles/Captions Types: subtitles, subtitles, subtitles, subtitles, subtitles, subtitles, subtitles, subtitles, subtitles, subtitles, subtitles
